text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the victor is Narita Brian! Narita Brian has
bested the Actress and the Twin Crown Champion
and taken the win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, not even those two could stop you. Who
will be the one to defeat you, I wonder?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Besides me, of course.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm still fired up. I won't be cooling off
anytime soon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Speaking of, there's more out there right?
Opponents like them, I mean.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I want to get stronger. Whatever happens, I—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: The autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That was a splendid race today, I have to say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My inadequacy seemed to be thrust before me as
I watched you run ahead of me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Excuse my ramblings. Let me get back on topic.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is the first race of the
Senior Autumn Triple Crown. It's a time-honored
stage where the fastest compete, just as
prestigious now as it was long ago.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If it's strength that you're after, consider it an
essential race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Well then, I'll take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Bourbon, are you there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Rather than staring, you should have spoken up if
your curiosity was so piqued.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Or perhaps this is just vexation over the loss. I,
too, am suffering the sting of defeat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Even so, I will not resign myself to it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As long as she is in the Twinkle Series, and as long
as I can compete, I will race her as many times as
it takes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Therefore, next time...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Me too.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I... won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Quite. Well said.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: The autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I need you to bring me back up to fighting
condition.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Sharpen these fangs until they're fearsome
enough to take down even the strongest prey!
